title: centaurea nemoralis var. obscura
intro: Centaurea nemoralis var. obscura, also known as a variety of mountain cornflower, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Centaurea nemoralis var. obscura include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in digestion, making it a sought-after herb in herbal medicine. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
